info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("DELETE", "/api/pin?type=SOME_STRING_VALUE&id=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/pin/ \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"type":"space","id":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"type\":\"space\",\"id\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/pin/", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

200.description: Get  pin list, include base pin

x-codeSamples.source:
import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/pin/list", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request PUT \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/pin/order \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"id":"string","type":"space","anchorId":"string","anchorType":"space","position":"before"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"id\":\"string\",\"type\":\"space\",\"anchorId\":\"string\",\"anchorType\":\"space\",\"position\":\"before\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PUT", "/api/pin/order", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
